title: Dense French Tofu Casserole
description: A hearty vegetarian French-inspired casserole featuring tofu, plum sauce, and fresh vegetables, wrapped in a moist papillote style bake for lunch or dinner.
instructions: Press the tofu to remove excess moisture and cut it into 1-inch cubes.
In a bowl, whisk together plum sauce, soy sauce, and sesame oil.
Toss the tofu cubes with the sauce mixture until evenly coated.
Line a baking dish with parchment paper and arrange the tofu, sliced carrot, zucchini, and spinach in a single layer.
Drizzle olive oil over the vegetables and sprinkle with thyme, salt, and pepper.
Cover the dish with foil and bake for 25 minutes.
Remove the foil and bake for an additional 10 minutes until the tofu is golden and vegetables are tender.
Transfer the casserole to individual serving dishes and garnish with fresh herbs.
Serve hot and enjoy the dense, flavorful texture.
